title: The Captain
desc: A pilot and his crew leave no stone unturned to ensure the safety of passengers after a plane's windshield shatters at 30,000 feet.

title: Spies in Disguise
desc: Lance Sterling, a secret agent, finds himself transformed into a pigeon. He then sets out with his associate Walter to stop a villain who is using Sterling's disguise to carry out a dangerous plan.

title: Black Hawk Down
desc: Captain Mike Steele leads a team of nearly 100 US Army Rangers who travel to the capital city of Mogadishu to catch the top two lieutenants of a Somali warlord.

title: Predator
desc: A team of commandos led by a Vietnam War veteran is sent to rescue hostages in a Central American jungle. They soon discover that they are being hunted by a deadly creature.

title: Independence Day: Resurgence
desc: Two decades after an alien invasion, Earth faces another attack by the same species, but a brave group of people rise to defend the planet from destruction.
